section_miscategorizations.text: No tenderness to palpation of the abdomen was noted.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This directly contradicts the earlier exam statement in the same section: 'Physical examination revealed right-sided abdominal tenderness consistent with a kidney stone.' The issue is internal inconsistency within Findings rather than misplacement into a different section, so it is not a true section miscategorization but may confuse readers.
